problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: If Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry is applied to types, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
